title: Ingestion Envelope
description: Canonical envelope for all Waaseyaa ingestion requests. Defines the required structure for source provenance, payload, and traceability.

source.description: The origin system or adapter that produced this envelope (e.g. 'manual', 'crawl://example.com', 'api://github').

type.description: The content type this envelope targets (e.g. 'core.note', 'taxonomy_term').

payload.description: The entity data to ingest. Structure varies by target type and is validated against the type's schema.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the envelope was created.

trace_id.description: Unique trace identifier for request correlation. Auto-generated if omitted.

tenant_id.description: Owning tenant identifier. Required in multi-tenant deployments.

metadata.description: Optional key-value metadata for operator diagnostics, routing, and auditing.
